song.title: The Lord is Risn
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) The Lord is ris’n; and death’s dark judgment flood Is passed, in Him who bought us with His blood. The Lord is ris’n: we stand beyond the doom Of all our sin, through Jesus’ empty tomb.
[V2] 2) The Lord is ris’n: with Him we also rose, And in His grave see vanquished all our foes. The Lord is ris’n; beyond the judgment land, In Him, in resurrection life we stand.
[V3] 3) The Lord is ris’n; and now redeemed to God, We tread the desert which His feet have trod. The Lord is ris’n: the sanctu’ry’s our place, Where now we dwell before the Father’s face.
[V4] 4) The Lord is ris’n: the Lord is gone before. We long to see Him, and to sin no more. The Lord is ris’n: our triumph-shout shall be, “Thou hast prevailed! Thy people, Lord, are free!”
song.author: William P. MacKay
